# Video Brief Template

Use this before writing, filming, or editing.

```markdown
# Video Brief

## Core

Video topic:
Target viewer:
Platform:
Primary signal to move:
Secondary signal:
Search phrase / topic keyword:

## Viewer psychology

Viewer problem:
Viewer belief before watching:
Viewer belief after watching:
Emotion to trigger:
Reason to keep watching:
Reason to save/send/comment/follow:

## Creative design

First-frame type:
First-frame visual:
Hook type:
Hook line:
First payoff time:
Story format:
Proof asset:
Text function:
Caption style:
Audio style:
CTA:

## Structure

0–1s visual:
1–3s hook:
3–7s first payoff:
Body beats:
Final beat:
CTA line:

## Prediction

Expected winning metric:
Failure signal:
Next variant if it fails:
```

## Example

```markdown
# Video Brief

Video topic: caption placement for Reels
Target viewer: small creators editing talking-head clips
Platform: Reels + Shorts
Primary signal: saves
Secondary signal: follows
Search phrase: caption placement for Reels

Viewer problem: captions cover the subject and reduce clarity
Viewer belief before: captions are fine as long as they are readable
Viewer belief after: caption placement affects visual attention
Emotion: relief + surprise
Reason to save: pre-post caption placement checklist

First-frame type: before/after split
Hook type: mistake reveal
Hook line: “Your captions are readable, but still in the wrong place.”
First payoff: 3 seconds
Story format: before → after → why
Proof asset: side-by-side example
Text function: labels + edited captions
CTA: “Save this caption placement checklist before your next edit.”

0–1s: side-by-side bad/better caption placement
1–3s: hook line
3–7s: show fixed version
Body: explain safe zones, subject clearance, UI overlays
Final: one-line rule
CTA: save checklist

Expected metric: save rate
Failure signal: good retention but low saves = not checklist-like enough
Next variant: add numbered checklist and stronger final rule
```
